summary: Lead preflight found that the late writer REVIEW cannot be routed to QA yet because @monsoon/sim-ai fails strict typecheck. The replacement test_engineer is already held and should repair the same branch without expanding scope, then produce an R2 REVIEW handoff.

decisions: Do not route this REVIEW to QA until strict typecheck passes.
Use the replacement test_engineer thread to repair the late predecessor output because the predecessor was already closed stale and the replacement is held without further edits.

Request that live multi-year AI command-path evidence be strengthened if feasible; current runner reports zero accepted AI commands in live continuation and only probe fixtures demonstrate accepted command kinds.

risks.risk: Live continuation currently has AI accepted commands 0, so independent QA may consider the same-GameCommand-path acceptance criterion under-proven if not improved.
A new workspace package @monsoon/sim-ai is allowed by task scope but must remain workspace-local and typecheck-clean.

requested_action: Fix typecheck failures, rerun required tests, strengthen live GameCommand-path evidence if feasible without scope drift, and produce R2 REVIEW handoff at project/messages/outbox/M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001__MSG-20260627-M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-WRITER-R2-REVIEW__test_engineer.json.
